sidebar.masterTooltip: Files that can be saved to your master folder — CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md memory, .mcp.json servers, hooks, permissions, keybindings. Add the live source to master, restore the source from master, or diff the two.

account.title: Account
account.signedInHint: Sign in with skillsafe.ai to install, save, and share skills.

projects.title: Projects
projects.empty: No projects added yet. Click {addLabel} to pick a folder. Each project's .claude/, .codex/, .cursor/, or .agents/ directory is read when you pick the “Project” scope.
projects.removeTooltip: Remove {name} from this list (your folder is not deleted)

about.title: About
about.autoUpdateHint: Automatically download new versions in the background and install them on next launch.
about.readyToInstall: v{version} is downloaded and ready to install.

layout.title: Layout
layout.hint: Reset the sidebar, artifact-list, and bottom-panel sizes to their defaults.

language.title: Language
language.hint: Choose the language used throughout AI SkillSafe.

workbench.calloutMasterOnlyBody: No live source on this machine.
workbench.calloutAbsent: Not in master yet. Add it to keep a curated copy.
workbench.calloutDriftBody: Source has changed since it was added to master.
workbench.transferToToolTitle: Translate and write this to a tool's config location
workbench.noTransferTranslator: No transfer translator yet for {category}. Open the file in master and copy by hand if needed.
workbench.primaryTitleDrifted: Capture the current source content into master
workbench.primaryTitleInMaster: Re-write the master copy from the current source
workbench.primaryTitleAdd: Save a curated copy of the source into the master folder
workbench.restoreFromMasterTitle: Overwrite the source with the curated master content
workbench.openSourceTitle: Open the source file in your default editor
workbench.transferAnotherTitle: Translate and write to another tool
workbench.noBoundSources: No sources bound. Use Transfer to push the canonical body into a tool's location and bind it as a source.
workbench.boundTitle: Bound but never synced — Restore to push the canonical body.
workbench.restoreSourceTitle: Write the master payload into this source's path.
workbench.unbindSourceTitle: Remove this source from the master entry. The destination file is not touched.
workbench.emptyStateBody: Cross-tool inventory of memory files, MCP servers, hooks, permissions, and keybindings. Pick an item from the list to inspect what's on disk and add it to your master folder.
workbench.emptyStateHint: The master folder is just a folder of files — set its location in Settings → Workbench master folder. It's safe to git init the master folder and version-control your setup.

transferDialog.titleMcp: Transfer MCP server to another tool
transferDialog.mcpNotSupported: MCP transfer to {tool} is not supported.
transferDialog.modeSectionMcp: If a server with this name exists
transferDialog.modeReplaceMemoryDesc: Overwrite the destination. A .skillsafe.bak copy is kept beside it.
transferDialog.modeReplaceMcpDesc: Overwrite the server entry if it already exists; siblings are preserved.
transferDialog.modeAppendDesc: Append to the existing destination, separated by a horizontal rule.
transferDialog.modeSkipMemoryDesc: Only write when the destination doesn't exist yet.
transferDialog.modeSkipMcpDesc: Only write when no server with this name exists yet at the destination.
transferDialog.bindTitle: Records the destination as a source on the master entry so future Restore-from-master writes here too.
transferDialog.bindLabel: Bind destination as a source of the master entry

remoteEditor.empty: Select a remote skill on the left to view.
remoteEditor.isMissingHeader: {ns}/{name} isn't reachable. A few things this could mean:
remoteEditor.missingPublishMismatch: The publish didn't actually land at this namespace — confirm in Settings that you're signed in as {ns}, then try uploading again.
remoteEditor.missingPrivate: The skill is private and the current sign-in isn't its owner. Sign in as the owner from Settings.
remoteEditor.missingDeleted: The skill was deleted on skillsafe.ai.
remoteEditor.manifestMissing: The manifest or one of its blobs is missing on the server. Try a different version from the dropdown above, or open the skill page on skillsafe.ai.
remoteEditor.unversionedHint: This skill has no published version on skillsafe.ai yet, so the file contents can't be fetched. Open the source repository to view it.

remoteList.missingMeta: Skill is missing namespace or version.
remoteList.setCurrentToast: Set current version of {ns}/{name} to v{version}.
remoteList.deleteDescription: This soft-deletes the skill on skillsafe.ai, revoking its share links and all versions:
remoteList.deleteWarning: ⚠ Existing installs will keep working, but no one will be able to install or browse this skill again.

cloudActions.title: Cloud actions
cloudActions.signInHint: Sign in via the Settings gear to save or share skills.
cloudActions.noBundles: No skill bundles loaded. Switch to a tool with bundles in the sidebar.

mergeMcp.title: Merge MCP servers
mergeMcp.empty: Neither side has any MCP servers in scope. Add some via Workbench → Add to master, or run a tool that registers MCP servers and re-scan.
mergeMcp.pickProjectRoot: Pick a project root for the destination side.

hooks.pickProjectFirst: Pick a project in the sidebar to edit project-scope hooks.
hooks.title: Hooks
hooks.empty: No hooks configured. Pick an event below to add one.

keybindings.title: Keybindings
keybindings.willCreateOnSave: File will be created on save.

mcp.pickProjectFirst: Pick a project in the sidebar to edit project-scope MCP servers.
mcp.title: MCP servers

permissions.pickProjectFirst: Pick a project in the sidebar to edit project-scope permissions.
permissions.title: Permissions
permissions.sharedTitle: settings.json — checked into the repo, shared with the team

editor.emptyHint: Select an artifact on the left to view.
editor.editTitleTooLarge: File too large to edit in-app
editor.diskChangedPrompt:
This file has changed on disk since you started editing.

Click OK to overwrite with your edits, or Cancel to abort the save.

configsList.permissionsDesc: Allow / Deny / Ask rules + default mode
configsList.hooksDesc: Run shell commands before/after tool use, on Stop, etc.
configsList.mcpDesc: Connect Claude Code to external MCP tools

bulkRestore.title: Bulk restore from master
bulkRestore.emptyState: No master entries have a recorded source on this machine. Use Workbench → Transfer to push individual entries to a tool.
bulkRestore.skippedHint: These master entries have no recorded source. Use Workbench → Transfer to push them to a tool.
bulkRestore.restoredCount: Restored {succeeded} of {total} {total, plural, one {master entry} other {master entries}}.

versionAction.explainYank: Yanked versions stay downloadable for installs that already pin them, but disappear from default resolution.
versionAction.explainSetCurrent: Pinning a version sets the default that install / search surfaces for new users.

scanReport.notScannedHint: No publisher scan report on file.
scanReport.cleanHint: The scanner found no problems with this version. Always review skill content yourself before granting it tools.

installScope.title: Install {name}
installScope.noRecentProjects: No recent projects — open a project first to enable this option.
installScope.useSymlinkLabel: Use symlink (Save disk space and share with other tools)
installScope.useSymlinkHintWith: Bundle lives in .agents/skills, with a symlink in .claude/skills.

shareLinks.title: Share links — {ns}/{name}
shareLinks.revokePrompt: Revoke this share link? Anyone using it will lose access.

accountPanel.signedOutHint: Sign in to save, share, and install private skills via skillsafe.ai. Public skills can be installed without signing in.
accountPanel.signOutDialogMessage: You'll lose access to your private skills, share links, and the ability to upload until you sign back in.
accountPanel.signOutDialogNote: Local skills on disk are unaffected.

cloudInfo.privateTitle: Your skills that are not shared
cloudInfo.sharedTitle: Your skills that are public or have active share links

historyPanel.title: History
historyPanel.empty: No history yet. Edit and save to record one.
historyPanel.showDiffTitle: Show diff vs current on-disk content
historyPanel.restorePrompt:
Restore this version ({time})?
The current on-disk content will be snapshotted first.

app.deleteDescriptionFile: This will remove the file from disk:

app.deleteSymlinkNotePrefix: The underlying skill bundle that this symlink points to will

app.errorNoPublishedVersion: Skill {ns}/{name} has no published version yet.

artifactList.backupTitleNeedsSetup: Set a backup folder in Settings → Local Backup first
artifactList.uploadTitleNotBundle: Only bundle skills (with SKILL.md) can be uploaded
artifactList.uploadTitleNotSignedIn: Sign in via Settings to upload
